subject: Interior of a large rounded alien spacecraft with a prominent dome structure, no figures present
description: The card art depicts the interior of a large alien spacecraft. The dominant visual element is a rounded green dome or pod structure at center, set against the curved interior walls of the ship. The color palette is muted green-tan-gold with arena-like architecture — tiered or curved walls. No figures are present. The card bears a SAMPLE watermark. The overall composition is architectural and environmental rather than character-focused — this is a location card.
